forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 100. Heat index values as high as 104. West wind around 10 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 75. Heat index values as high as 102. West wind 6 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
In Boston, the afternoon sun blankets the city in a shimmering heat, enveloping everything in a warm embrace that hovers near the century mark. The air feels thick with a hazy warmth, as the temperature dances upward, creating an almost surreal atmosphere where the horizon shimmers like a mirage. The sky sprawls out, a brilliant expanse of blue, unmarred by fog or clouds—a perfect backdrop for this vibrant day. As evening approaches, expect the warmth to linger, with temperatures settling around a mild 75 degrees as twilight descends. It will be a comforting warmth, with just a whisper of a breeze reminding you that summer evenings can still carry a hint of relief.

In these conditions, dressing in light, breathable fabrics will serve you well; think of linen shirts and soft cotton shorts, complemented by a wide-brimmed hat if you're venturing out. Light footwear will keep your spirits lifted, easing the experience as you navigate your evening plans. As the heat gives way to the gentle evening air, consider a leisurely stroll along the waterfront, where the soft lapping of the waves harmonizes with the golden glow of the sunset. Alternatively, if you're feeling adventurous, seek out a quiet café to unwind, sip an iced beverage, and savor the slowly unfolding evening. All in all, Boston is poised for a lovely summer evening, inviting you to embrace its warmth and the gentle lull of the world around you.
